# Search Profile Template

## Target

What are we trying to discover or compare?

## Target Type

`project | skill | plugin | tool | mcp_server | product | paper | internal_asset | market_opportunity`

## Required Sources

| --- | --- | --- |

| Skills registry | yes/no |  |

## Query Seeds

- names:
- synonyms:
- ecosystem terms:
- shape terms:
- negative queries:

## Stop Criteria

- Required sources covered or explicitly marked unavailable.
- Known candidates included.
- At least two expanded query rounds produce no new high-overlap candidates.
- Coverage confidence and recommendation confidence are explainable.
